title: Principal Instructional Designer at SSC Tube

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at SSC Tube
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
